description_text: Item Name: Car Rear Spoiler Material: ABS Quantity: 2Pcs Features: Easy to Install, Car Accessories Size: 40cm x 9cm/15.75" x 3.54" (Approx.) Item Fitment: Universal Note:All of our products are exclusively designed for cars please confirm the model before placing an order！ Features: ABS material that is very and solid. Easy to install without extra adjustment. Improves the sporty appearance for your car. Installation: Please allow a slight dimension difference due to different manual measurements. Due to the light and screen setting difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. Package Include: 2X Car Rear Spoiler (Installation instruction is NOT included) If you have any problem,please contact us, we will do our best for you! We would send out parcel as soon as possible. Processing time would be extended if there is hot shopping season,anything please contact with us. If the goods arrived local produce tariffs, need customers to pay by themselves. Delivery details 1.Orders will be shipped within 3 business day after payment cleared. All items will be tested in advance before sending out. 2.We ship to Confirmed Paypal Addresses. 3. 7-20 days shipping to the United States, other countries 15 to 30 days Returns 1.All item Comes with Basic 3 Months Sellers Warranty,if item defective in 3 Month,We will offer replacement withour extra Charger(including shipping fee)After we Receive the Defective item. 2.If item Defective after 3 Month，Buyers Might Need pay the Shipping fee For resend the replaced item. About us Our company is dedicating to reseach & development of car series products, just started in 2012 manufacture the lighting equipments and accessories for the car and motorcycle vehicle. We have variety of products in ebay online.We providing the best delivery and the item satisfication guarantee. Contact us 1.If you are dissatisfied for any reason, please donot be quick to leave negative/neutral feedback. please do contact us first,We will work hard to make sure EVERY CUSTOMER SATISFIED and resolve any problem for you 2. Our working time:Monday to Friday
